name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Download Utilities in Events
notes: This Building Block detects when a download utility is being used on an Endpoint (ie: ftp, sftp, curl, cuteftp, wget, certutil, bits, nc).
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Download Utilities in Events on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.General Audit Event, System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success, Audit.Command Execution Attempt
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is not N/A
when the event matches Process Name (custom) matches any of expressions (?i)(bitsadmin\.exe|c(ertutil\.exe|url)|ftp|nc|wget)
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Download Utilities in Events on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.General Audit Event, System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success, Audit.Command Execution Attempt
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is not N/A
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) matches any of expressions (?i)(bitsadmin\.exe|c(ertutil\.exe|url)|ftp|nc|wget)
